#### Taxa of interest

Only records specified 'taxa of interest' were used (Table \@ref(tab:toiTa)).

`r paste0(clean_text$text[i], " ", clean_text$context_text[i])`

```{r toiTab}

  toi_tab <- settings$toi %>%
    list2DF() %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::left_join(taxa$taxonomy) %>%
    dplyr::select(kingdom, phylum, order, family, taxa) %>%
    dplyr::arrange() %>%
    dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(-taxa)) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(taxa = paste0("_"
                                   , sort(taxa)
                                   , collapse = ", "
                                   , "_"
                                   ) %>%
                       stringi::stri_replace_last_regex("_, _", "_ and _")
                     ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  toi_tab %>%
    knitr::kable(caption = "Taxa of interest")

```
